title: Jia Prefecture
summary:
Jia Prefecture or Jiazhou may refer to:

Jia Prefecture (Sichuan) (тўЅтиъ),  a prefecture in imperial China in modern Leshan, Sichuan, China
Jia Prefecture (Shaanxi) (УЉГтиъ), a prefecture in imperial China in modern Yulin, Shaanxi, now Jia County
